formal_config_contract.prompt_identity.date_string: DD Mon YYYY; explicit and immutable

frozen_material.storage_rule: Raw frozen prompt material remains local; commit only compact audit summaries and artifact SHA values.

execution_order: Record the canonical manifest SHA256 and exact expected row count.
Change the config to verify mode and bind manifest plus manifest_sha256.
At normal evaluator startup, regenerate and compare all rows before CUDA visibility, CUDA queries, worker spawn, checkpoint load, or model forward.
Abort on any scope, sample-key, message, prompt, input-ID, tokenizer, template, revision, environment-contract, or row-count mismatch.
During evaluation, recheck each runtime prompt against its frozen row and emit compact per-example hash records.
unsupported_formal_paths: dynamic templates without an explicit date_string override
templates depending on timezone, locale, process environment, or randomness
